segments.text: It's so great to be here with you today and to discuss the topic of publications
Obviously I will not do it alone and I was thinking that the best company you can discuss this with
are the leaders who were building this business in Poland from the very beginning
and we are lucky because they are here today
So please join me in welcoming to the stage our amazing guests
Elisa, we are going to talk today about duplication
but first off, how does it feel for you to be here?
This is surreal for me to stand here
because tomorrow's convention will be my chance
since I started working with Rotera
Actually my journey began with a trip to convention in Amsterdam
and I walked into a room filled with 2,000 people obsessed with essential oils
and only two of us were from Poland
my Apple ID is Zach and me
Wow, what an opportunity this is for us
What kind of a team I want to build
Who I want to work with
and how many places I wanted for my team in the founders' path
Almost everything on this list is already checked
Presidential diamond is still ahead of me
And it didn't happen because I was someone special
It happened because I wasn't alone
The women standing here beside me today
Today, this program runs almost half of my organization
And we didn't just build a business together
Since 2017, we've created Ed Within together
who are still in use within our teams today
They share the knowledge and commitment with generosity
Not only with our teams, but also with Crossline
This helps build a culture of collaboration
And became one of the foundation of our team's strong position
And Elisa, one of the first people you started building business with was Kinga, right?
She started working on her due date
And even from the maternity ward
She was organizing classes and inviting guests
And I was the one who presented the oils
And then she traveled across Europe
With a child by her side
But it wouldn't have happened without two things
The first was something deep inside me
A strong desire to change, to live differently
And that I could do it
That I couldn't stay where I was
Without waiting for the right moment
Did I feel ready? Not even close on Henestick
I still have moments of doubt
If you want to change something
Now, not later, not when you are ready
The hope of knowing doesn't come
You create it by taking the first step
Even when your hands are shaking like mine now
I have a question for you
Because I know that you know Elisa
And I guess also Elisa remembers me from back then, right?
We've known Elisa from high school
And I am so grateful that you thought of me
When you started to develop the business
And that I was on your list
And I remember when we were sitting in my father's office
And Elisa showed us how to lead an oil class
And she gave us a little leaflet
With a few sentences about essential oils
Now you will go and you will do your lessons
And you will open the bottles
And they will do work for you
And we made, you know, everything happen so quickly
We didn't have time to reflect
We didn't analyze our weaknesses, our beliefs
We organized a huge number of meetings
And we started to train people as directors and executives
We simply felt that Totera will elevate our life
And lives of many women to a new level
So it was very quick action
I found this leaflet the other day
And I think this is the last one in our team
One leaflet and thousands of flags
This leaflet is a symbol of a fact
That you don't have to be an expert to start this business
You just need your first application tool
And you can do the business
There is one more person here
A person that you can talk numbers with
But also you can organize crazy events
And still have fun doing it
How was it for you at the beginning?
I had my own IT business
Which had driven me into depression
I didn't know what's on the other course
You don't need a perfect plan
All you need is vision, perseverance and the right people around you
And then when you truly take responsibility for your life everything begins to change
And something beautiful happens along the way
They draw from your strength, your life, your energy
And they begin to change too
Because when we share the goodness we carry with its arms as it spreads
It reaches farther than we think, it touches lives
And this is how the world begins to change
Not all at once but through us
So tell me, is there anyone here who doesn't want to live a better life in a better kinder world?
That I never doubted that this business will be successful
I feel when we do something from hurt
We have built strong foundation for our community
And I believe that together we will develop them
I didn't think I will enjoy building essential oil business as an architect
Business opportunities like this doesn't come around often
But despite this our mission is to tell as many people as possible about Coterra
We have to tell people that they can build the financial and time freedom here
And they don't have to run like hamsters on a wheel
If Elisa hadn't thought of me eight years ago
I would be working in an architecture office for sometimes ten hours a day
And ladies, if it wasn't for your courage, open mind and also persistence
We wouldn't be here today with Totela Europe Convention
So thank you very much from the bottom of my heart for everything that you've done
